# DryDep Process CMakeLists.txt
# Generated by CATChem Process Generator

# Add DryDep process module
add_library(drydep_process
    DryDepProcess_Mod.F90
)

# Link dependencies
target_link_libraries(drydep_process
    precision_mod
    state_mod
    error_mod
    process_interface_mod
)

# Include directories
target_include_directories(drydep_process PRIVATE
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}
)

# Install targets
install(TARGETS drydep_process
    DESTINATION lib
)

# Install module files
install(FILES
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/drydepprocess_mod.mod
    DESTINATION include
)
